gwarancje.heroLead: Clear rules of the game — what is covered by the warranty, for how long, what is not covered, and how to claim reimbursement from insurance. For patients from Poland and abroad.
gwarancje.warrantyHeading: Warranties for Treatments — Duration and Scope
gwarancje.warrantyIntro: The clinic's warranty covers the work of our team. The manufacturer's warranty for materials applies independently (implants: lifetime Nobel/Straumann, crowns: according to the ceramic manufacturer's terms). The condition for the warranty is regular check-ups every 6 months + hygiene treatments every 6-12 months.
gwarancje.warrantyImplantScope: Full coverage of the re-implantation cost if the implant falls out due to our clinical error. The manufacturer (Nobel, Straumann, Astra Tech) replaces the titanium implant for life if it is damaged materially.
gwarancje.warrantyCrownScope: Free replacement in case of fracture, detachment, or discoloration during the warranty period. After 3 years, a paid replacement is possible with a loyalty discount.
gwarancje.warrantyEndoScope: If a problem requiring re-endodontics of THE SAME tooth arises within 12 months after treatment, we perform the procedure free of charge. Condition: final crown placed within 4 weeks of endodontics + regular hygiene treatments.
gwarancje.warrantyVeneerScope: Replacement in case of fracture (without external mechanical injury) or detachment. Patients with bruxism are required to wear a relaxation splint (warranty voided without the splint).
gwarancje.warrantyHygieneScope: Hygiene is a preventive treatment repeated every 6 months. No periodic warranty, but we guarantee that we use EMS Airflow protocols + if we detect caries or subgingival calculus — we inform immediately (without additional diagnostic costs).
gwarancje.warrantyOrthoPeriod: Until the end of treatment + 1 year of retention
gwarancje.warrantyOrthoScope: If the aligners do not achieve the planned effect (based on 3D simulation), we continue treatment with additional sets of aligners at no extra charge. After treatment — 1 year of retention with a night splint included.
gwarancje.exclusionsHeading: What is Not Covered by the Warranty
gwarancje.exclusionsIntro: The clinic's warranty is a commitment to the quality of work — it does not cover situations arising from factors beyond our control:
gwarancje.exclusion1Desc: Smoking tobacco after implant placement (within the first 3 months of healing) reduces the effectiveness of osseointegration by 30-50%. Patients who smoke during the healing period are not covered by the implant warranty.
gwarancje.exclusion2Desc: The warranty is valid provided that regular hygiene visits (every 6 months) and control visits (every 6-12 months depending on the procedure) are maintained. Lack of control for more than 18 months automatically voids the warranty.
gwarancje.exclusion3Desc: Impacts, accidents, biting hard objects (ice cubes, rice stones, pens), bruxism without a protective splint. Crowns and veneers damaged due to external injury are not covered by the warranty.
gwarancje.rodoHeading: RODO, GDPR, and Medical Data Security
gwarancje.rodoLead: Your medical data is the foundation of trust — we protect it in accordance with RODO and the Polish Patient Rights Act.
gwarancje.rodoBullet1: 📋 Medical documentation stored for 20 years (according to Article 29 of the Patient Rights Act from 2008).
gwarancje.rodoBullet2: 🔐 Data encrypted AES-256-GCM at the application level (pgcrypto-equivalent) — Supabase backup does not contain plaintext PESEL/medical history.
gwarancje.rodoBullet3: 👁️ Audit log of every access to your data for 90 days (RODO Art. 30) — we provide it upon request within 30 days.
gwarancje.rodoBullet4: 🇪🇺 Full compliance with RODO/GDPR — for patients from the EU, we issue Subject Access Requests within 30 days (Art. 15) and the right to be forgotten except for medical documentation (Art. 17.3.b).
gwarancje.rodoBullet5: 🔐 2FA TOTP + Passkeys (WebAuthn) on accounts of staff accessing patient data. Passwords verified by HaveIBeenPwned upon change.
gwarancje.insuranceIntro: We issue personal invoices with the doctor's PWZ number, ICD-10 code, and procedure description in accordance with insurance requirements. For patients from abroad — invoices in the chosen language (PL/EN/DE).
gwarancje.insurance1: 🇵🇱 Allianz Care, Medicover, LUX MED, Inter Polska (private invoices)
gwarancje.insurance2: 🇪🇺 Generali, AXA, Cigna, MetLife (EU international policies)
gwarancje.insurance3: 🇩🇪 German statutory and private health insurance (BEMA/GOZ format)
gwarancje.insurance4: 🇬🇧 BUPA, Aviva, Vitality (UK private medical insurance)
gwarancje.insurance5: 🇺🇦 Українські страхові компанії (на запит — рахунки українською)
gwarancje.insuranceFootnote: We do not have a direct contract with insurers — the patient pays us, we issue a detailed invoice, and the patient submits it to their insurer. Reimbursement depends on the policy conditions and the specific health fund. Check your policy for covered procedures before your visit.
gwarancje.kostenerstattungHeading: 🇩🇪 Cost Reimbursement — for Patients from Germany
gwarancje.kostenerstattungLead: Patients from Germany can obtain reimbursement for dental treatment in Poland based on EU Directive 2011/24 (cross-border healthcare). Step-by-step procedure:
gwarancje.kostenerstattungStep1: Consult your health fund (gesetzliche oder private Krankenversicherung) before treatment. Some funds require prior approval (Vorabgenehmigung) for more expensive procedures (implants, orthodontics). Ask about Heil- und Kostenplan.
gwarancje.kostenerstattungStep2: Schedule a consultation with us (online or by phone). We issue a free Kostenvoranschlag (estimate) in German after the first visit — you can present it to your health fund for pre-approval.
gwarancje.kostenerstattungStep3: After the procedure, you receive a detailed invoice in a format compliant with BEMA (Bewertungsmaßstab zahnärztlicher Leistungen) or GOZ (Gebührenordnung für Zahnärzte) — with procedure codes, material descriptions, and costs in EUR (exchange rate on the day of the procedure) and PLN.
gwarancje.kostenerstattungStep4: You submit the invoice to your health fund along with the Heil- und Kostenplan. Reimbursement: up to the amount of Polish BEMA/GOZ rates (approximately 60-90% of the treatment cost in Poland for most standard procedures). Implants and aesthetics may require additional Zahnzusatzversicherung policy.
gwarancje.kostenerstattungFootnote: Standard reimbursement time from the health fund: 4-8 weeks from the submission of the invoice. If the fund denies part or all of the reimbursement — we will assist in preparing an appeal (Widerspruch) based on EU Directive 2011/24.
gwarancje.faqQ1: Does the warranty apply if I live abroad?
gwarancje.faqA1: Yes — the clinic's warranty applies regardless of the patient's place of residence. If you live in Germany, the UK, or another country and a warranty-covered problem arises, you can come to Opole for re-treatment without additional fees for work (travel costs are not covered). Alternatively — we issue detailed diagnostic documents (X-rays, description, treatment plan) to present to a local dentist if you decide to treat locally (local treatment costs are not covered by our warranty).
gwarancje.faqQ2: What if I change clinics and then a problem arises?
gwarancje.faqA2: The clinic's warranty requires regular control visits with us (every 6-12 months depending on the procedure) + hygiene treatments every 6 months. If you switch to another clinic, the warranty is voided — we cannot be responsible for the quality of work not performed by our team. If the problem arose due to previous treatment with us (before changing clinics), we assess it individually based on documentation.
gwarancje.faqQ3: Can I get an extension of the warranty for an additional fee?
gwarancje.faqA3: Currently, we do not offer paid warranty extensions. All conditions are fixed and cover the standard scope for each group of procedures. Manufacturers (Nobel, Straumann, Ivoclar Vivadent) offer their own extended warranties for implants/ceramics — details are provided along with the material origin certificate after the procedure.
gwarancje.faqQ4: What exactly do you issue for German health funds?
gwarancje.faqA4: Standard: personal invoice in German, BEMA or GOZ format (depending on the type of fund), with procedure codes, material descriptions, costs in EUR and PLN, date of the procedure, doctor's signature, and PWZ number. For patients requiring Vorabgenehmigung — Kostenvoranschlag (estimate before treatment) with a step-by-step treatment plan. All free of charge — this is the standard of our service for patients from Germany.
gwarancje.faqA5: Mikrostomart is a commercial clinic — we do not have a contract with NFZ. All procedures are 100% payable according to our price list. NFZ only covers basic treatment in clinics with a contract (list at nfz.gov.pl). Your private health insurance (Allianz, Medicover, LUX MED) may partially cover our services — check with your insurer before your visit.
gwarancje.faqQ6: How long do you keep my medical documentation?
gwarancje.faqA6: 20 years from the last visit (according to Article 29, paragraph 1 of the Polish Patient Rights Act from 2008). During this time, you have the right to a full copy of the documentation (Subject Access Request — RODO Art. 15) — we issue it within 30 days of the request in electronic (JSON + PDF) or paper form. After 20 years, the documentation is destroyed according to protocol.
gwarancje.faqQ7: Does the warranty cover anesthesia costs for re-treatment?
gwarancje.faqA7: Yes — if the problem is covered by the warranty, we cover ALL costs of re-treatment: local anesthesia (The Wand), materials, doctor's time, any additional control X-rays. The patient only pays if they choose pharmacological sedation or nitrous oxide as an additional comfort option (not medically required).
gwarancje.faqQ8: Where do I report a warranty complaint?
gwarancje.faqA8: The fastest way: by phone {phone1} (Mon-Fri 8-19) or by email {email}. Describe the problem + attach photos (if visible) + date of the original procedure (or patient number from the e-card). We respond within 24 working hours. Control visit under warranty — within 7-14 days of reporting.
gwarancje.ctaHeading: Do you have questions about warranties?
gwarancje.ctaLead: Contact the reception or schedule a consultation — we will answer any questions about treatment conditions, insurance, and cost reimbursement.

The Wand anesthesia system (computer-dosed, nearly imperceptible). 3Shape Trios 5 intraoral scanner. Digital X-ray + CBCT on-site.
zahnarztOpole.procedureHeading: How to start treatment with us
zahnarztOpole.procedureIntro: Four simple steps from the first contact to the start of treatment.
zahnarztOpole.procedureStep1: Schedule online or by phone. The form at /rezerwacja is available 24/7, phone reception Mon-Fri 8-19. Typically, the first appointment is within 7-14 days (urgent cases on the same day).
zahnarztOpole.procedureStep2: First visit (250 PLN, 45-60 minutes). Medical history, clinical examination, X-ray (panoramic or localized), intraoral photos, discussion of your expectations. After the visit, you receive a written treatment plan with price ranges.
zahnarztOpole.procedureStep3: Decision and acceptance of the plan. No pressure — you can take the plan home, compare, ask questions by email. If you need a second opinion (e.g., from an orthodontist), we are happy to assist with a referral.
zahnarztOpole.procedureStep4: Start of treatment. Each visit scheduled in advance (SMS reminder 24h before). After each visit, a protocol for your e-patient card (you can view it online).
zahnarztOpole.locationIntro: Mikrostomart, ul. Centralna 33a, 45-098 Opole. City center, good connections from all over Poland.
zahnarztOpole.loc1Desc: Entrance directly from ul. Centralna. Gate open during office hours. Spaces for 6 cars. For patients with disabilities, we can reserve a spot — call in advance.
zahnarztOpole.loc2Desc: From the main station: bus line 12 or 16 to the stop 'Centralna' (10 minutes), then 200 m on foot. From the PKS station similarly. Single ticket from 4 PLN (MZK Opole).
zahnarztOpole.loc3Desc: Exit 'Opole-West' (junction 247). Wrocławska street to the center, turn left onto ul. Centralna. From Wrocław 50 min, from Katowice 90 min, from Kraków 2.5h. Border with Germany (Olszyna) ~200 km.
zahnarztOpole.loc4Desc: Enter in navigation: 'Mikrostomart Opole' or 'Centralna 33a Opole'. GPS coordinates: 50.6745° N, 17.9181° E. Current opening hours and reviews can be found in our Google Maps profile.
zahnarztOpole.servicesIntro: Everything you may need — in one place, without the need to travel to different specialists.
zahnarztOpole.service3: Microscopic endodontics (canals under ZEISS) — from 800 PLN
zahnarztOpole.service8: Surgery (extractions, PRF, wisdom teeth) — from 400 PLN
zahnarztOpole.doctorLead: Two owners — Marcin and Elżbieta Nowosielscy. Plus 3-4 hygienists and receptionists.
zahnarztOpole.doctorBio: Dentist Marcin Nowosielski M.Sc. — implantologist, microscopic endodontist. RWTH Aachen 2021 (second in Poland with M.Sc. in Lasers in Dentistry, youngest). Endodontic Curriculum PTE. Oral Surgery Academy. International lectures. Author of a book published by Czelej. Elżbieta Nowosielska — dental hygienist, specializes in professional hygiene EMS Airflow, prevention, and patient education. Supporting team: reception PL/EN/DE, hygienists, and assistants.
zahnarztOpole.reviewsIntro: Selected reviews from Google Maps — the full list (overall rating 5.0 / 5) is available in our profile.
zahnarztOpole.faqQ1: What are the opening hours of Mikrostomart?
zahnarztOpole.faqA1: Monday-Friday: 8:00-19:00. Saturday: only selected appointments (for patients after procedures or in emergencies — scheduled individually). Sundays and holidays: closed. Current hours and any holiday changes can be found in our Google Maps profile.
zahnarztOpole.faqQ2: How much does the first visit cost?
zahnarztOpole.faqA2: Basic consultation: from 250 PLN (45-60 min). The price includes: medical history, clinical examination, localized X-ray (1-2 images), intraoral photos, and a written treatment plan with price ranges. If CBCT is required (e.g., before an implant) — an additional 400-500 PLN.
zahnarztOpole.faqQ3: How to schedule an appointment at Mikrostomart?
zahnarztOpole.faqA3: Three ways: (1) Online form at /rezerwacja — available 24/7, choose the doctor, date, and time. (2) By phone at {phone1} (Mon-Fri 8-19). (3) By email at {email} — we respond within 24 working hours. Urgent cases (pain, injury) — call, we try to accommodate on the same day.
zahnarztOpole.faqA4: Yes — free parking directly in front of the office (6 spaces), entrance from ul. Centralna. Gate open during working hours. For patients with disabilities, we can reserve a spot — call in advance.
zahnarztOpole.faqA5: Yes — reception and doctors speak Polish, English, and German. We issue detailed invoices in the chosen language (for reimbursement from German health insurance based on EU directive 2011/24). We have a dedicated page for patients from outside Opole with information about hotels, transport, and procedures.
zahnarztOpole.faqA6: Mikrostomart is a commercial practice — we do NOT have a contract with NFZ. All services are payable according to our price list. NFZ only reimburses basic treatment in practices with an NFZ contract (list on the NFZ website). We issue invoices for individuals with private insurance (Medicover, LUX MED, Allianz Care) — check with your insurer which procedures are covered.
zahnarztOpole.ctaHeading: Start taking care of your smile today
zahnarztOpole.ctaLead: First visit from 250 PLN. Full range of services in one place — without the need to travel to different specialists all over Opole.

dentistOpole.heroLead: Modern dental clinic in southern Poland — dental implants, microscope root canal treatment and cosmetic dentistry. English-speaking service, on-site parking, invoices for insurance reimbursement. Since 2016, led by Marcin Nowosielski M.Sc. (RWTH Aachen). Easy access from Wrocław & Katowice airports.

usunKonto.title: Account & data deletion
usunKonto.subtitle: You can delete your patient account at any time — in the app or by sending an e-mail request, without installing the app.
usunKonto.inAppTitle: Delete your account in the app
usunKonto.inAppText: Sign in to the app, open My Profile → "Delete account" and confirm with your password. Your account and app data (contact details, notification preferences, chat history) will be deleted and personal data anonymized.
usunKonto.emailIntro: If you no longer have access to the app, send a deletion request by e-mail. Please include:
usunKonto.emailLi2: the phone number provided at registration (for identity verification),
usunKonto.emailLi3: the e-mail address linked to the account (if you remember it).
usunKonto.emailSla: We will process your request without undue delay, no later than within 30 days (Art. 12 GDPR), and send a confirmation to your e-mail address.
usunKonto.scopeTitle: What we delete and what we must retain
usunKonto.scopeDeleted: We delete: your app account, contact details (e-mail, preferences), push notification tokens and reception chat history.
usunKonto.scopeRetained: We retain: medical records for 20 years (Art. 29(1) of the Polish Patient Rights Act — a statutory obligation) and billing documents for the period required by tax law. This data is no longer linked to your app account.
usunKonto.contactText: Write to {contactEmail} or call {contactPhone}. See our Privacy Policy for details on data processing.
